title: mycopteris steyermarkii
intro: Mycopteris steyermarkii is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae, found in Venezuela and Colombia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Mycopteris steyermarkii is typically prepared as an infusion or a decoction, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or a salve for external application.
